meaning: n.企业联合,交战国间交换俘虏的协议
examples: Formal price-fixing by cartel and informal price-fixing by agreements covering the members of an industry are commonplace.
Drug cartel assassins cut off his head.
Instead of the old monopoly, a new cartel now holds sway.
Pro baseball, like other major sports leagues in the United Sates, is a cartel.
Among other Mexican cartels, the Zetas and the Sinaloa Cartel are now fighting over territories in Central America.
